title: Fly Me To The Moon extended version
display_title: Fly Me To The Moon extended version
wikitext:
[]: Fly Me To The Moon extended version             Quote Post by gelflinghand » Wed May 11, 2022 4:09 pm The four-and-a-half minute version of "Fly Me To The Moon" on the Japanese blu-ray features some Japanese speech from around 1:30 to 2:00. Does anyone know what it says? There's a copy online at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s_pFnJ52pNg

[]: Re: Fly Me To The Moon extended version             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Wed May 11, 2022 6:34 pm Asuka: “Hey, you wanna kiss?” (ねえ キスしようか？ nē, KISU shiyōka? ) “Loneliness...” (寂しい･･･ sabishī... ) “Do you love me?” Rei: “Do you love me?” (私のこと好き？ watashi no koto suki? ) “Who are you?” (あなた、誰？ anata, dare? ) “Do you want me?” Misato: “Why don’t you become one with me?” (私とひとつにならない？ watashi to hitotsu ni naranai? ) “If you become one both in mind and body, it’s a very, very conforting feeling.” (心も体もひとつになる それはそれは･･･ とても気持ちのいいことなのよ kokoro mo karada mo hitotsu ni naru, sore wa sore wa... totemo kimochi no ii kotona no yo ) “Do you love me?” This song version was used in episode 16.

[]: Re: Fly Me To The Moon extended version             Quote Post by gelflinghand » Wed May 11, 2022 7:43 pm Thanks!
